text:
On Wed, Apr 30, 2008 at 11:14:13AM -0400, Jon Nistor wrote:
> Thank you!

And here it is.  It builds and installs fine when the RRD option is
selected.  I'd appreciate runtime testing of it though, just to be safe.

Please let me know if you approve, so I can commit it.

-- WXS
